orchestrator.name: summary_dashboard
orchestrator.description: Summary Dashboard: 7-day and 30-day data quality overview with charts

queries.name: daily_validation_summary_7d
queries.description: Daily pass/fail/warn counts for the past 7 days
queries.query: SELECT run_date, SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, SUM(CASE WHEN status='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN status='WARN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warnings, SUM(CASE WHEN status='NOT_EXECUTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_executed, COUNT(*) AS total FROM audit_db.etl_orchestrator_audit WHERE event_type IN ('VALIDATION','COMPARISON') AND run_date >= date_format(date_add('day', -7, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY run_date ORDER BY run_date

queries.name: pass_rate_by_layer_7d
queries.description: Pass rate breakdown by ETL layer for the past 7 days
queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN source_label LIKE '%staging%' OR source_label LIKE '%stg%' THEN 'Staging' WHEN source_label LIKE '%datalake%' OR source_label LIKE '%dl%' THEN 'DataLake' WHEN source_label LIKE '%base%' THEN 'Base' WHEN source_label LIKE '%master%' THEN 'Master' ELSE 'Other' END AS layer, COUNT(*) AS total_checks, SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pass_rate FROM audit_db.etl_orchestrator_audit WHERE event_type IN ('VALIDATION','COMPARISON') AND run_date >= date_format(date_add('day', -7, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY pass_rate

queries.name: top_failing_checks_7d
queries.description: Top 10 most frequently failing checks in the past 7 days
queries.query: SELECT validation_name, check_type, COUNT(*) AS failure_count, MAX(run_date) AS last_failure FROM audit_db.etl_orchestrator_audit WHERE event_type IN ('VALIDATION','COMPARISON') AND status IN ('FAIL','NOT_EXECUTED') AND run_date >= date_format(date_add('day', -7, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY validation_name, check_type ORDER BY failure_count DESC LIMIT 10

queries.name: quality_dimensions_7d
queries.description: Quality dimension breakdown for the past 7 days
queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN check_type LIKE '%row_count%' OR check_type LIKE '%completeness%' THEN 'Completeness' WHEN check_type LIKE '%comparison%' OR check_type LIKE '%accuracy%' THEN 'Accuracy' WHEN check_type LIKE '%date%' OR check_type LIKE '%format%' OR check_type LIKE '%validity%' THEN 'Validity' WHEN check_type LIKE '%fresh%' THEN 'Freshness' WHEN check_type LIKE '%volume%' OR check_type LIKE '%rolling%' THEN 'Volume' WHEN check_type LIKE '%no_rows%' OR check_type LIKE '%duplicate%' OR check_type LIKE '%null%' OR check_type LIKE '%unique%' THEN 'Uniqueness' ELSE 'Other' END AS dimension, COUNT(*) AS total_checks, SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pass_rate FROM audit_db.etl_orchestrator_audit WHERE event_type IN ('VALIDATION','COMPARISON') AND run_date >= date_format(date_add('day', -7, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY pass_rate

queries.name: daily_validation_summary_30d
queries.description: Daily pass/fail counts aggregated for the past 30 days
queries.query: SELECT run_date, SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, SUM(CASE WHEN status='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pass_rate FROM audit_db.etl_orchestrator_audit WHERE event_type IN ('VALIDATION','COMPARISON') AND run_date >= date_format(date_add('day', -30, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY run_date ORDER BY run_date

queries.name: cost_trend_30d
queries.description: Daily Athena query cost for the past 30 days
queries.query: SELECT run_date, ROUND(SUM(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(cost_usd, ''), '0') AS DOUBLE)), 4) AS daily_cost FROM audit_db.etl_orchestrator_audit WHERE run_date >= date_format(date_add('day', -30, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY run_date ORDER BY run_date
